title: Reasons to Add The Cooper Companies (COO) to Your Portfolio
text: The Cooper Companies (COO) continues to benefit from strength in its business segments. Its acquisitions are likely to drive the top line further.

title: The 7 Lowest-Paying Dividend Stocks for Income Haters
text: The lowest-paying dividend stocks don't have the same cachet as their high-yielding counterparts. After all, if you are looking for your portfolio to generate steady returns and/or steady income, you obviously want to find the stocks that can provide the highest risk-adjusted return.

title: Cooper Companies (COO) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Cooper Companies' (COO) first-quarter fiscal 2023 revenues reflect a solid segmental performance despite a year-over-year decline in earnings.

title: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (COO) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (NYSE:COO ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call March 2, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Kim Duncan - VP of IR and Risk Management Al White - President and CEO Brian Andrews - CFO and Treasurer Conference Call Participants Jon Block - Stifel Larry Biegelsen - Wells Fargo Jeff Johnson - Baird Brian Zarahn - Mizuho Securities Jason Bednar - Piper Sandler Matthew Mishan - KeyBanc Robbie Marcus - JP Morgan David Saxon - Needham Chris Pasquale - Nephron Steve Lichtman - Oppenheimer & Company Navann Ty - BNP Paribas Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. And welcome to Q1 2023 Cooper Companies Earnings Conference Call.

title: The Cooper Companies (COO) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: The Cooper Companies (COO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 9.02% and 2.93%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: CooperCompanies Announces First Quarter 2023 Results
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., March 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO) today announced financial results for its fiscal first quarter ended January 31, 2023.
